summary: Chatbot Bank Withdrawal System - All tests passed. Backend APIs (26/26) and Frontend E2E tests (20/20) verified. Fee calculation with ₹10 flat + 20% admin charge working correctly. Minimum ₹500 withdrawal enforced. Admin stats/pending/all endpoints functional. Bank Transfer UI removed from RedeemPageV2 (DMT commented out in SERVICE_CONFIG).

issues: Missing data-testid attributes for automated testing - recommend adding data-testid to buttons, table rows, and filter controls

action_items: Consider adding data-testid attributes to AdminChatbotWithdrawals.js for better automated testing coverage
Bank Transfer (DMT) code still exists in RedeemPageV2 but is commented out - consider cleanup if permanently removed
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tests use non-existent user IDs for negative case testing
context_for_next_testing_agent:
## Chatbot Bank Withdrawal System Tests Complete

### APIs Tested:
1. **Fee Calculation** - /api/chatbot-redeem/calculate-fees
   - Processing Fee: ₹10 flat
   - Admin Charge: 20% of amount
   - Minimum: ₹500
   - PRC to INR: 10:1

2. **Eligibility Check** - /api/chatbot-redeem/eligibility/{uid}
   - Returns KYC status and balance check

3. **Admin APIs**:
   - /api/chatbot-redeem/admin/stats - Counts by status + completed summary
   - /api/chatbot-redeem/admin/pending - Pending requests with pagination
   - /api/chatbot-redeem/admin/all - All requests with status filter
   - /api/chatbot-redeem/admin/request/{id} - Request details
   - /api/chatbot-redeem/admin/process/{id} - Process withdrawal

4. **User APIs**:
   - /api/chatbot-redeem/history/{uid} - User's request history
   - /api/chatbot-redeem/saved-accounts/{uid} - Saved bank accounts
   - /api/chatbot-redeem/status/{request_id} - Request status

### UI Changes:
- Bank Transfer (DMT) service commented out in RedeemPageV2.js SERVICE_CONFIG
- AdminChatbotWithdrawals.js page added at /admin/chatbot-withdrawals
- Route protected, requires admin role

### Test Files:
- Backend: /app/backend/tests/test_chatbot_withdrawal.py (26 tests)
- Frontend: /app/tests/e2e/chatbot-withdrawal.spec.ts (20 tests)
